channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Backlash Emerges as a Real Business Risk
item.description: If AI were a political candidate, it would be losing badly. The AI hype cycle suggests the technology is booming, but backlash is growing.

item.title: U.S. reportedly concerned about attack drone threat from Cuba
item.description: Cuba has acquired over 300 military drones and has discussed using them against the U.S. base at Guantanamo Bay, according to military sources.

item.title: Trump advisers fear China may target Taiwan within five years
item.description: Some Trump advisers worry that the China summit's main outcome is increased risk of Chinese President Xi Jinping taking action against Taiwan.

item.title: Trump warns Iran time is running out for a deal to avoid strikes
item.description: President Trump told Axios that time is limited for Iran to present a better offer, warning of potential harder U.S. strikes.
